lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bahut siaanap bharam na jaae |
lines.english: Even great cleverness does not dispel doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਚਿ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਅਚੇਤ ਨ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਅਜਗਰਿ ਭਾਰਿ ਲਦਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: pach pach mue achet na cheteh ajagar bhaar ladaaee he |8|
lines.english: The unconscious fool does not remain conscious of the Lord; he putrifies and rots away to death, carrying his heavy load of sin. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵਹੁ ਭੁਲੀ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: naavahu bhulee chottaa khaae |
lines.english: Wandering from the Name, he endures beatings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਦੇਖਾਲਿਹੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: mai dekhaalihu tis saalaahee |
lines.english: Show me anyone who is, and I will praise him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬਾਦ ਬਿਰੋਧਹਿ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin baad birodheh koee naahee |
lines.english: No one is free of conflict and strife.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: man tan arap milai jagajeevan har siau banat banaaee he |9|
lines.english: Dedicating mind and body to God, one meets the Lord, the Life of the World, and becomes just like Him. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee gat mit koe na paavai |
lines.english: No one knows the state and extent of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: vaddee vaddiaaee veparavaahe |
lines.english: Great is the glorious greatness of the independent Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਦਾਤੀ ਸਗਲੀ ਤਿਨਹਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: saache saahib tott na daatee sagalee tineh upaaee he |10|
lines.english: There is no lack of gifts of our True Lord and Master. He created all. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਵਡਾ ਕਹਾਇ ਵਡਾਈ ਖਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: je ko vaddaa kahaae vaddaaee khaavai |
lines.english: Whoever calls himself great, will be eaten by his greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਦਾਨੁ ਸਮਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: aap upaae daan samaahe |
lines.english: He Himself created, and gives sustanance to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਨਹੀ ਦਾਤਾ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਰਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aap deaal door nahee daataa miliaa sehaj rajaaee he |11|
lines.english: The Merciful Lord is not far away; the Great Giver spontaneously unites with Himself, by His Will. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸੋਗੀ ਇਕਿ ਰੋਗਿ ਵਿਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik sogee ik rog viaape |
lines.english: Some are sad, and some are afflicted with disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਉ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਅਨਹਦਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਖਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: bhagat bhaau gur kee mat pooree anahad sabad lakhaaee he |12|
lines.english: Through loving devotion, and the Perfect Teachings of the Guru, the unstruck sound current of the Shabad is realized. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare su aape aape |
lines.english: Whatever God does, He does by Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਹਠੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਨ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eik hatth kar mareh na keemat paae |
lines.english: Some act in stubbornness and die, but do not know the value of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਨਾਗੇ ਭੂਖੇ ਭਵਹਿ ਭਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eik naage bhookhe bhaveh bhavaae |
lines.english: Some wander and roam around, hungry and naked.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਵਹਿ ਅੰਨੁ ਨ ਖਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik teerath naaveh an na khaaveh |
lines.english: Some bathe at sacred shrines and refuse to eat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਤਿ ਅਵਿਗਤ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: gat avigat kee saar na jaanai boojhai sabad kamaaee he |13|
lines.english: They do not know the difference between good and bad; this is understood only through the practice of the Word of the Shabad. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਜਲਾਵਹਿ ਦੇਹ ਖਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik agan jalaaveh deh khapaaveh |
lines.english: Some torment their bodies in burning fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin mukat na hoee kit bidh paar langhaaee he |14|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, liberation is not obtained; how can anyone cross over? ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਪੈ ਅਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh raam na japai avaaee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are destitute; they do not meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਚਿ ਪਚਿ ਬੂਡਹਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਕੂੜਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਬੈਰਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: pach pach booddeh koorr kamaaveh koorr kaal bairaaee he |15|
lines.english: They are ruined, destroyed and drowned from practicing falsehood; death is the enemy of the false. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਛੋਡਹਿ ਉਝੜਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramat chhoddeh ujharr jaaee |
lines.english: Abandoning the Guru's Teachings, some wander in the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਆਵੈ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukame aavai hukame jaavai |
lines.english: By the Hukam of the Lord's Command, they come, and by the Hukam of His Command, they go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਝੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸੋ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: boojhai hukam so saach samaavai |
lines.english: One who realizes His Hukam, merges in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak saach milai man bhaavai guramukh kaar kamaaee he |16|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, he merges in the True Lord, and his mind is pleased with the Lord. The Gurmukhs do His work. ||16||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape karataa purakh bidhaataa |
lines.english: He Himself is the Creator Lord, the Architect of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin aape aap upaae pachhaataa |
lines.english: He evaluates those whom He Himself has created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape satigur aape sevak aape srisatt upaaee he |1|
lines.english: He Himself is the True Guru, and He Himself is the servant; He Himself created the Universe. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨੇੜੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape nerrai naahee doore |
lines.english: He is near at hand, not far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਝਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਪੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: boojheh guramukh se jan poore |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs understand Him; perfect are those humble beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਏਹ ਵਡਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tin kee sangat ahinis laahaa gur sangat eeh vaddaaee he |2|
lines.english: Associating with them night and day is profitable. This is the glorious greatness of associating with the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਸੰਤ ਭਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jug jug sant bhale prabh tere |
lines.english: Throughout the ages, Your Saints are holy and sublime, O God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਰਹਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਦਾਲਦੁ ਜਿਨ ਨਾਹੀ ਚਿੰਤ ਪਰਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ausatat kareh parahar dukh daalad jin naahee chint paraaee he |3|
lines.english: They chant His Praises, and their pain and poverty are taken away; they are not afraid of anyone else. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaaveh rasan rasere |
lines.english: They sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, savoring it with their tongues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਰੀਸਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sangat kul taare saach pareeseh |
lines.english: They serve up Truth, and so save their companions and relatives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਜਾਗਤ ਰਹਹਿ ਨ ਸੂਤੇ ਦੀਸਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: oe jaagat raheh na soote deeseh |
lines.english: They remain awake and aware, and do not appear to sleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਮਲ ਮੈਲੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਓਇ ਰਹਹਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kalimal mail naahee te niramal oe raheh bhagat liv laaee he |4|
lines.english: They are not stained with the filth of sins; they are immaculate and pure, and remain absorbed in loving devotional worship. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਝਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: boojhahu har jan satigur baanee |
lines.english: O humble servants of the Lord, understand the Word of the Guru's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਸਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਦੇਹ ਪੁਰਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: ehu joban saas hai deh puraanee |
lines.english: This youth, breath and body shall pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਜੁ ਕਾਲਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਧਿਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aaj kaal mar jaaeeai praanee har jap jap ridai dhiaaee he |5|
lines.english: O mortal, you shall die today or tomorrow; chant, and meditate on the Lord within your heart. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਮਾਰੇ ਕਾਲੁ ਉਛਾਹਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: koorr maare kaal uchhaahaarraa |
lines.english: Death viciously kills the false beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਕੂੜ ਕਬਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: chhoddahu praanee koorr kabaarraa |
lines.english: O mortal, abandon falsehood and your worthless ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਕੂੜਿ ਪਚਹਿ ਮਨਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਹੁ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਚੈ ਪਚਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: saakat koorr pacheh man haumai duhu maarag pachai pachaaee he |6|
lines.english: The faithless cynic is ruined through falsehood and his egotistical mind.On the path of duality, he rots away and decomposes. ||6||
